verdict: No current PR #230 surface supplies a source-Higgs pole cross-correlator authority.  The production harness emits top source-response and same-source C_ss support, but has no C_sH, canonical-Higgs operator, or W/Z response schema.  Existing EW/SM Higgs notes start after a canonical H is supplied or select allowed monomials; they do not derive the PR source operator overlap.  Gauge-VEV, Z_h, Hessian, and BRST/Nielsen shortcuts are already blocked.  Thus C_sH is a valid future target, not a hidden current-surface closure.
